do new agents request access to the nip29 group if they are not already there?
do I have a way to add them to the group from tenex-edge
New agents are added directly via group_put_user at session-start; there's no join-request flow. There's no standalone CLI command to add a pubkey to a group — offered to add one.
let's make ti tenex-edge project add <project> <pubkey-or-npub-or-nip05>
Implemented `tenex-edge project add` accepting hex, npub, or NIP-05, plus a first-turn membership warning shown to the agent if it's not in the group.

No — changes were only built locally; the remote still has the old binary. Offered to push and rebuild there.
Pushed and rebuilt on the remote; the new binary is active there.

Strengthened the warning wording to be a blocking action-required message that the agent must relay to the user on its first response.
